EXPEDITION LOG — D'AGNELLI SURVEY

field seasons: 2012-present | base camp: london

HABITATS DOCUMENTED

manufacturing — the dominant biome. 100+ sites catalogued for swiss industrial giant. predictive maintenance species identified. $18m yield.
telecom — dense urban habitat. first enterprise-wide deployment across 7 territories for british telco.
financial services — two distinct subspecies observed. american bank (75k-strong colony, data architecture). uk investment firm (£170.3b foraging range, financial planning).
healthcare · oil & gas · aerospace & defence — additional biomes explored. high-sensitivity environments. resilient solutions deployed.
EXPEDITION LEADER CREDENTIALS: msc ethical hacking (distinction) | bsc computer science | prince2 practitioner | stanford ml certified
